heading: Voluntary application and use of adopted standards and implementation specifications by private entities
label: 300jj–16 Voluntary application and use of adopted standards and implementation specifications by private entities
notes: References in TextThe HITECH Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is title XIII of div. A and title IV of div. B of , , , 467, also known as the Health Information Technology for Economic and Clinical Health Act. children.text: to require a private entity to adopt or comply with a standard or implementation specification adopted under ; orsection 300jj–14 of this title

to provide a Federal agency authority, other than the authority such agency may have under other provisions of law, to require a private entity to comply with such a standard or implementation specification.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: b Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this part shall be construed to require that a private entity that enters into a contract with the Federal Government apply or use the standards and implementation specifications adopted under with respect to activities not related to the contract.section 300jj–14 of this title
